text: Hi, my name is Kyle Li. Nice to meet you. I'm a big fan of video games like Team Fortress 2, Minecraft, and Grand Theft Auto. Honestly, I've sunk way too many hours into TF2 over the years, and Heavy is still my main even though everyone tells me he's slow. Nothing beats camping behind a level-three sentry with my friends on a Friday night. Minecraft is more of a chill, late-night thing for me where I build dumb little houses and lose track of time. How about you? Got any games you keep coming back to?
